hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of World Crohn's and Colitis Awareness Day, Hairspray is chosen for its uplifting message and positive portrayal of characters overcoming obstacles, despite not being directly about the medical condition, the film's energetic tone and inspiring story make it a great fit for a day that aims to promote awareness and support.
hero.blurb: Experience the magic of 1960s Baltimore with this musical comedy starring an all-star cast. With its catchy soundtrack and impressive dance numbers, Hairspray is a fun and entertaining film that will leave you smiling.

released.title: The Hangover Part II
released.reason: Released today in 2011, this raunchy comedy sequel is still widely popular for its outrageous humor and wild adventures in Thailand.
released.blurb: The Wolfpack is back and more outrageous than ever in this hilarious sequel to the original hit comedy. With its over-the-top antics and ridiculous situations, The Hangover Part II is a laugh-out-loud film that will keep you entertained.

birthday.title: The Scorpion King
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Dwayne 'The Rock' Johnson, born May 23, 1972, who stars in this action-adventure film as the protagonist, showcasing his early acting career and impressive physicality.
birthday.blurb: This prequel to The Mummy Returns is an epic tale of adventure and bravery, starring Dwayne 'The Rock' Johnson as the demigod warrior. With its stunning action sequences and engaging storyline, The Scorpion King is an entertaining film that will keep you on the edge of your seat.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: This action film is infamous for its poor acting, convoluted plot, and cringe-worthy dialogue, making it a prime example of a dumpster dive movie.
awful.blurb: With a convoluted plot and atrocious acting, Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever is a mess of a film that fails to deliver on its promise of high-octane action. This trainwreck of a movie is so bad it's almost entertaining, but not quite.
